title: How to Build a Lead Velocity Rate Dashboard Mini-Guide
description: Sales and marketing leaders get a concise practitioner guide explaining how to calculate, track, and act on Lead Velocity Rate as a predictive pipeline health metric inside their existing reporting stack.
gumroad_description:
HOOK

Your pipeline looks healthy, but you're not actually sure if revenue is coming. Lead Velocity Rate fixes that—it's the early warning system most teams don't know they're missing.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Sales leaders who've been blindsided by pipeline collapse and want a real leading indicator before deals disappear

— Revenue ops folks managing multiple systems (Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, etc.) who need a metric that actually works across platforms

— CMOs proving marketing impact beyond vanity metrics, without building a data warehouse

WHAT'S INSIDE

— The exact formula (and why the formula everyone uses is slightly wrong)

— How to set it up in your existing tools in under an hour, no engineers required

— Real benchmarks so you know if your LVR is actually good

— How to interpret the weekly dashboard to catch slowdowns 2-3 months before they hit your number

— Common mistakes that make LVR useless (and how to avoid them)

CLOSING

This isn't theory. It's how the best teams caught problems early.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
